data.id: TR-PICUS-DEFENSE-002: Unsigned Process Creating Binaries in Windows System Directory
data.name: TR-PICUS-DEFENSE-002: Unsigned Process Creating Binaries in Windows System Directory
data.description: Detects unsigned or suspicious processes creating executable files in protected Windows system directories (System32, SysWOW64). This is a strong indicator of privilege escalation exploitation or UAC bypass. Legitimate system processes rarely perform this action. MITRE T1574.008.
data.contents: (process.isSigned = false OR process.path contains '\\Temp\\' OR process.path contains '\\AppData\\') AND process.fileCreations contains '\\Windows\\System32\\' AND (process.fileCreations endswith '.exe' OR process.fileCreations endswith '.dll' OR process.fileCreations endswith '.sys')

techniques.name: Hijack Execution Flow: Microphone and Speaker Device Drivers
Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism: Bypass User Account Control
